title: How Anthropic Doesn't Build the WRONG Things with Claude
summary: Austin Marchese presents four rules derived from Anthropic founders Dario and Daniela Amodei's public statements for deciding what to build with Claude. The video argues these principles help avoid building the wrong products across side projects, startups, and business optimization.
